title: Acraft
description: It's the game... but with 0.1 textures ! This is an "inverted backport" of alpha textures to the 1.20
body:
(i've started creating it on 12/11/2023 !)
Subscribe to be notified for the new versions ! :3

# Alphacraft
Introducing Acraft (Alphacraft) - A Minecraft Texture Pack


## What is it ?
You want to play the alpha Minecraft but with today's features ? Try alphacraft ! it "backports" (official) alpha textures of minecraft to newer versions !


## What do I need ?
Optifine or Sodium are fully recommended


View the screenshots page for all modified blocks and items :3




I am working very hard to complete this texture pack, tell me in the comments what you think :D
